description: Illustrative multi-user Slack bot pattern. Run one long-lived findtime.io MCP server process and inject _endUserId per Slack user on each tool call.

notes: Do not spawn one MCP subprocess per Slack user.
Hash the Slack user ID in the bot host, then inject the opaque hash into tool-call arguments.
Never pass raw Slack user IDs, names, emails, or other PII as _endUserId.

arguments.query: What time is it in Tokyo?
